query: SELECT id, name, email, open_id, subscription_tier, subscription_status, stripe_customer_id, stripe_subscription_id, created_at FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%Larry%' OR name LIKE '%Riedmann%' OR email LIKE '%riedmann%' OR email LIKE '%larry%';
